name: Question / Discussion
about: Ask a question or start a discussion

labels: question

---

## Question
What would you like to ask or discuss?

## Context
Provide any context that would help answer your question.

## What I've Already Tried
Have you already tried any solutions? Describe what you've attempted.

## Related Documentation
Have you checked:
- [ ] README.md
- [ ] QUICKSTART.md
- [ ] AI_FEATURES.md
- [ ] SECURITY.md
- [ ] Existing issues

## Additional Information
Any additional information that might be helpful.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues and documentation
- [ ] I have provided clear context for my question
- [ ] I have checked if this is a bug (if so, use Bug Report template)
